title: Update french locale
bodyText:
I have made some change in the french translation.
It's just some bad interpretation and/or bad word usage.

title: update german locales for v.0.9.7
bodyText: I've made some changes for the german translations

title: Remove onsflag-iphonex-portrait in web client
bodyText:
Fixes extra padding in the web ui on iPhones in portrait orientation.
The flag adds top padding to the interface and is intended for use in Cordova apps that consume the entire screen where the notch gets in the way.
Valetudo runs inside of Safari which adds its own status bar and padding so having this enabled results in extra whitespace at the top of the screen.
Here's what the UI looks like on my phone before the patch:

title: Fixes for Hungarian language
bodyText: Made some minor improvements for the localization. Mainly the new strings are corrected.

title: Updated Spanish locale
bodyText: Fix: “Zone cleanup” was being translated as “zone cleaned up”

title: [RFC] Implement enforced https server if key and cert files available
bodyText:
This pr is only a Request for Comments.
I think to have the option for encrypted web gui is a wanted feature for valetudo if we dont trust our network or want to open the web gui to the internet.
I know that the code isn't perfect and can be optimised, but this is only a quick proof of concept.
Any thoughts about such a feature and how we should implement it?
Binary size increases by about 72 KB:

31587 KB with no ssl
31659 KB with ssl

Haven't checked for any ram usage/constraints so far...

title: UI bugfix for iPhones
bodyText:
some changes for the webapp on iphone xs (max) and the display with round corners

better app icon (white background and padding)
fixed statusbar (black text on white background)
fixed buttons on bottom

BEFORE...
icon

header/statusbar (time, battery, wifi-icon... white font on white background)

footer (the bar overlays the buttons and display-cornes cutting them)

AFTER...
icon

header/statusbar

footer

title: Add czech translation
bodyText: Add first czech translation :)

title: Add experimental support for roborock s4 devices
bodyText: I like your new device features function! Following the specs of the roborock s4 (hardware comparable to Gen1 with software features of Gen2) I've added this model. Since I don't own an s4 by myself I tagged this PR as "experimental".

correct room-cleaning translations

title: Rework of the resume-button on home tab PR#165
bodyText:
Following the ideas of #165 (comment) in the orignially PR #165 I've done a rework of the position of the resume button on home tab. The button is located on the same position like the pause button now, but only visible in paused or error states:
Robot running:

Robot pausing:

title: IOS map pinch zoom bugfix
bodyText:
Bugfix to address #90
PointerUp event seems to work find on Android devices but breaks with IOS when both fingers lifted within the same event.  Original code only handled [0]th element and didn't correctly remove both finger lifts from this same event.

title: locales: Add Swedish translation
bodyText: Add Swedish translation

Either merge or keep as a future reference.

title: remove `water_grade` from `supported_features` list to fix homeassistant autodiscovery
bodyText:
autodiscovery is broken since 0.10.6 with the following error message:

Home Assistant 2021.4.6 error log
Exception in async_discover when dispatching 'mqtt_discovery_new_vacuum_mqtt': ({'name': 'rockrobo', 'unique_id': 'rockrobo', 'schema': 'state', 'device': {'manufacturer': 'Roborock', 'model': 'rockrobo.vacuum.v1', 'name': 'rockrobo', 'identifiers': ['rockrobo'], 'sw_version': '0.10.6'}, 'supported_features': ['start', 'pause', 'stop', 'return_home', 'battery', 'status', 'locate', 'clean_spot', 'fan_speed', 'water_grade', 'send_command'], 'command_topic': 'valetudo/rockrobo/command', 'state_topic': 'valetudo/rockrobo/state', 'set_fan_speed_topic': 'valetudo/rockrobo/set_fan_speed', 'set_water_grade_topic': 'valetudo/rockrobo/set_water_grade', 'fan_speed_list': ['whisper', 'min', 'medium', 'high', 'max'], 'water_grade_list': ['off', 'low', 'medium', 'high'], 'send_command_topic': 'valetudo/rockrobo/custom_command', 'json_attributes_topic': 'valetudo/rockrobo/attributes', 'platform': 'mqtt'},) Traceback (most recent call last): File "/usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/components/mqtt/mixins.py", line 160, in async_discover config = schema(discovery_payload) File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/voluptuous/validators.py", line 218, in __call__ return self._exec((Schema(val) for val in self.validators), v) File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/voluptuous/validators.py", line 341, in _exec raise e if self.msg is None else AllInvalid(self.msg, path=path) File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/voluptuous/validators.py", line 337, in _exec v = func(v) File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/voluptuous/schema_builder.py", line 272, in __call__ return self._compiled([], data) File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/voluptuous/schema_builder.py", line 817, in validate_callable return schema(data) File "/usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/components/mqtt/vacuum/__init__.py", line 19, in validate_mqtt_vacuum return schemas[value[CONF_SCHEMA]](value) File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/voluptuous/schema_builder.py", line 272, in __call__ return self._compiled([], data) File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/voluptuous/schema_builder.py", line 594, in validate_dict return base_validate(path, iteritems(data), out) File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/voluptuous/schema_builder.py", line 432, in validate_mapping raise er.MultipleInvalid(errors) voluptuous.error.MultipleInvalid: value must be one of ['battery', 'clean_spot', 'fan_speed', 'locate', 'pause', 'return_home', 'send_command', 'start', 'status', 'stop'] @ data['supported_features'][9]


referring to Vacuum Entity valid features are:
['battery', 'clean_spot', 'fan_speed', 'locate', 'pause', 'return_home', 'send_command', 'start', 'status', 'stop']

title: remove `water_grade_list` from `autoconf_payloads` list to fix homeassistant autodiscovery

title: Updated german language file
bodyText:
Since I stumbled over some errors in the current german language file, I took the time to update it:

removed some unnecessary exclamation marks
corrected some grammatical errors
rephrased some sentences for clarity and understandability

title: Update MqttClient.js for Home Assistant conformacy
bodyText:
Name and Unique ID shall not be the same, according to Home Assistant MQTT implementation.
Payload will have the Name "vacuum" in this change.
This should remove the warning message in Home Assistant as shown in issue 506
Thanks to dckiller51 in issue 506
Remember to restart Home Assistant after updating valetudo.
